name: xfactor-tutoring
description: A complete tutoring business management app built for X-Factor Tutoring.

scripts.sync:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run sync:android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run sync:android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleRelease
